dashboard.sobre_nosotros_p1: Welcome to the academy where the most relentless warriors in the galaxy are forged. Whether you seek the agility of a Jedi master or the brute strength of the dark side, our facilities are prepared to take your endurance to the highest level.
dashboard.sobre_nosotros_p2: Equipped with state-of-the-art technology and imperial free weight zones, there are no excuses here. Choose your path, master your body, and may the training be with you.
dashboard.promo_ciclo_desc: Test your endurance on the bike with our high-intensity sessions and the best music.
dashboard.promo_yoga_desc: Find your balance and improve your flexibility in our Yoga and Pilates sessions.
dashboard.promo_fuerza_desc: Want to build muscle? Train with the best machines and personalized advice.

actividades.error_cuota: You must have an active subscription to view the calendar.

calendario.error_cuota: You must have an active subscription to view the calendar and sign up for classes.

contratar.mensaje_confirmacion: You are about to subscribe to the plan:
